commit.message:
Add MongoDB Atlas for status/uptime data storage

Architecture now clean separation of concerns:
- Firestore → Ledger data (parties, transactions, audit logs)
- MongoDB Atlas → Status/monitoring data (uptime history, health checks)
- Upstash Redis → Caching layer only (speeds up all reads)

Changes:
- New: src/lib/server/mongodb.ts — MongoDB connection + uptime CRUD
  • Auto TTL index: entries expire after 90 days (no manual cleanup)
  • 2000 entry limit per query
- Cleaned: src/lib/server/upstash.ts — Redis for caching only (removed uptime code)
- Health route: MongoDB primary for uptime, Firestore fallback
  • Added MongoDB health check (ping latency)
  • 6 services now: API, Firestore, MongoDB, Redis, Auth, Audit
- Status page: Shows MongoDB Atlas as dedicated service (Leaf icon)
  • Services renamed: Database → Firestore, new MongoDB Atlas entry
- Fixed .env.local.example: replaced real tokens with placeholders
- Env vars: MONGODB_URI, MONGODB_DB (optional, defaults to sgala_status)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Full Redis caching layer across entire codebase

- New: src/lib/server/cache.ts — Generic cache layer (cacheGet/Set/Del/Pattern/withCache)
- All read operations now use Redis cache → Firestore only on miss:
  • Admin lookup by ID/email (5min TTL)
  • Settings (10min TTL)
  • System stats/dashboard (2min TTL)
  • Party list with stats (1min TTL)
  • Party by ID (2min TTL)
  • Ledger pages per party (1min TTL)
  • Ledger page by ID (2min TTL)
  • Page transactions with balances (30sec TTL)
- All write operations invalidate relevant caches:
  • Transaction CRUD → txn list, stats, party pages, page txns
  • Party CRUD → party list, party cache, stats
  • Page create/close → party pages, page cache
  • Settings update → pre-warms cache with new value
  • Admin update → admin ID + email caches
- Health API now checks Redis latency (ping) alongside DB
- Status page shows Redis Cache as 5th service with Zap icon
- Quick stats: 4 columns now (Uptime, DB Latency, Cache Latency, Server Uptime)
- Graceful fallback: everything works without Redis configured

Architecture: Firestore = ledger data, Upstash Redis = cache + uptime

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Cursor/development environment setup 3671 (#133)

* Add Cursor Cloud specific instructions for Linux development

- Document Linux-specific environment setup (GPU acceleration, node-pty rebuild, spawn-helper compilation)
- Document dev mode race condition workaround
- Note cr-sqlite and computer-use feature limitations on Linux
- Add tips for running Electron app and tests efficiently

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix cr-sqlite sync API to gracefully degrade on Linux

The sync API methods (getDbVersion, exportChangesSince, applyChanges)
threw when cr-sqlite extension was unavailable, preventing project
initialization on platforms without the extension (Linux).

Changed to return safe no-op defaults (0, [], empty result) instead
of throwing, allowing the sync service to initialize harmlessly
without CRDT sync capability.

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Remove accidentally committed .ade db backup files

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix onboarding to trigger on new machines with tracked .ade directory

Check for ade.db (gitignored, machine-local) instead of the .ade
directory (tracked in git with shared config). This ensures onboarding
runs when a project is cloned to a new machine that has the shared
scaffold but no local runtime state.

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add env var fallback for GitHub, Linear, and AI API key credentials

Allows headless/CI/cloud environments to provide credentials via
environment variables when Electron's safeStorage encrypted store
is empty or unavailable.

- GitHub: GITHUB_TOKEN or ADE_GITHUB_TOKEN
- Linear: LINEAR_API_KEY or ADE_LINEAR_TOKEN
- AI providers: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, GOOGLE_API_KEY,
  MISTRAL_API_KEY, DEEPSEEK_API_KEY, XAI_API_KEY, GROQ_API_KEY,
  TOGETHER_API_KEY, OPENROUTER_API_KEY

The encrypted store remains the primary source. Env vars are only
checked as a fallback when no stored credential is found.

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Auto-complete onboarding when env var credentials are detected

When a project is opened for the first time on a new machine and
environment variables provide at least one credential (GitHub token,
AI API key, or Linear token), mark onboarding as complete so the
wizard is skipped. This lets cloud agents and CI environments that
set credentials via env vars go straight to the Work view.

Co-authored-by: Arul Sharma <arul28@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix: expand AI provider env var check in onboarding auto-complete to cover all 9 supported providers

commit.message:
Add Shadow Lift preset using power-curve gamma algorithm

Implements the shadow lift algorithm with gamma=1.5 (exponent≈0.667).
The power curve raises dark tones more than bright tones while keeping
pure white anchored. Max deviation from identity is ~9,800 at i≈75,
well within the 32,000 driver safety limit.

Add Fp linear equation unique solution theorem

- field_linear_eq_solution: x₀ = -(inv(a)*b) は a*x₀+b=0 を満たす
- field_linear_eq_unique: 解の一意性 (ring_add_cancel_l + field_mul_cancel_l)
- field_linear_eq_unique_solution: 主定理 exists! x, a*x+b=0 (a≠0)
- fp_linear_eq_unique_solution: Fp = Z/pZ への系

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add libFuzzer harness and fix bugs discovered by fuzzing

Fuzz infrastructure:
- tests/fuzz_msgpack.c: libFuzzer harness exercising all 15+ SQL entry
  points (scalar, mutation, virtual table, JSON conversion)
- tests/fuzz_corpus/: 42 seed inputs covering every msgpack type
- CMakeLists.txt: MSGPACK_BUILD_FUZZ option (requires Clang with libFuzzer)

Bugs found and fixed by fuzzing:

1. Integer overflow in mpSkipOne bounds checks (heap-buffer-overflow)
   - str32/bin32/ext32: (i+sz<=n) overflows when sz is a malicious 32-bit
     value; changed to (sz<=n-i) which cannot overflow
   - ext8/ext16/ext32: header size checks were off-by-one (didn't account
     for the type byte)

2. Missing bounds checks in mpToJsonAt (heap-buffer-overflow)
   - Integer/float decoders (uint8..int64, float32/64) read past buffer
     end on truncated elements; added i+N>n guards for each case

3. Missing bounds checks in mpMergePatch (heap-buffer-overflow)
   - MAP16/MAP32 header reads on both target and patch buffers lacked
     ip+3/ip+5 <= n checks
   - Phase 1 inner loop (patch key scan) and Phase 2 inner loop (target
     key scan) lacked cursor >= buffer-end break conditions

4. Resource exhaustion hardening (OOM prevention)
   - Added MP_MAX_DEPTH (200) limit for mpToJsonAt and mpMergePatch
     recursion to prevent stack overflow on deeply nested structures
   - Added MP_MAX_OUTPUT (64 MB) limit in mpBufAppend/mpBufAppend1/
     mpBufReserve/mpBufGrow to cap output buffer growth
   - Fixed potential integer overflow in mpBufAppend size check:
     changed (nUsed+n > nAlloc) to (n > nAlloc-nUsed)

Verified: 1.1M+ fuzzer iterations with zero crashes under ASan+libFuzzer,
all 9 existing tests pass.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix buffer over-reads and infinite loops in msgpack_to_json()

- Clamp str/bin payload lengths when they exceed remaining buffer
  (prevents heap-buffer-overflow in mpJsonEscapeStr and mpReturnElement,
  and avoids passing -1 to sqlite3_result_text which triggers strlen on
  non-null-terminated data)
- Break array/map iteration loops early when cursor reaches end of blob
  (prevents hang when declared element count exceeds actual data)

commit.message:
Prove count_multiples_in_range and prime_pow_coprime_distinct

Both Admitted lemmas in integer.v are now fully proven, making
euler_phi_three_prime_powers Admitted-free.

New sub-lemmas added before count_multiples_in_range:
- mod_add_mul_small: (p*m+r) mod p = r for r < p
- filter_false_forall: Forall (f x = false) l -> filter f l = []
- filter_window_single_multiple: filter (k mod p =? 0) (seq (p*m) p) = [p*m]

Proofs:
- count_multiples_in_range: induction on m, seq_app + filter_app + above
- prime_pow_coprime_distinct: 3-step via prime_rel_prime/Zis_gcd_gcd,
  Z.coprime_pow_l/r, Z.gcd_greatest/divide_1_r

Updated progress/euler_phi_progress.md and proof_knowledge_base.md.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add euler_phi definition and main theorem euler_phi_three_prime_powers

- euler_phi: Euler's totient function (counts k in {0,...,n-1} with gcd(k,n)=1)
- group_order_unique, group_order_iso, group_order_product: GroupOrder algebraic properties
- euler_phi_group_order: phi(n) = |units(Z/nZ)| via bijection
- znz_units_decomp2: 2-var CRT isomorphism (Z/pqZ)* ≅ (Z/pZ)* × (Z/qZ)*
- euler_phi_mul: multiplicativity phi(p*q) = phi(p)*phi(q) when gcd(p,q)=1
- prime_pow_coprime_iff: gcd(k,p^e)=1 ↔ k mod p ≠ 0 for prime p
- euler_phi_prime_pow: phi(p^e) = p^(e-1)*(p-1) for prime p, e≥1 (depends on Admitted count lemma)
- nat_gcd_mul_coprime: gcd(a,c)=1 ∧ gcd(b,c)=1 → gcd(a*b,c)=1 (Nat level, via Gauss)
- euler_phi_three_prime_powers: main theorem phi(p^e*q^f*r^g) = p^(e-1)(p-1)*q^(f-1)(q-1)*r^(g-1)(r-1)
  (depends on Admitted: count_multiples_in_range, prime_pow_coprime_distinct)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
